title: Lego Bricks
description: Basiclly adds Lego bricks to minecraft
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9491c00b259fe4d63917e6e95a88c612aa602c.png)


This mod adds Lego Bricks to minecraft such as the Normal Lego Brick, also the 1X1 Lego Brick and more! This mod was made with MCreator This wont be updated daily but ill be updated when i feel like it. If you want Lego Bricks then this is the mod for you!!! ⚠This is not owned by LEGO and is fanmade!!!⚠
